Package org.eventb.core.ast

Class BinaryExpression

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.ast.Formula<Expression>
org.eventb.core.ast.Expression
org.eventb.core.ast.BinaryExpression
public class BinaryExpression extends Expression
BinaryExpression is the class for all binary expressions in an event-B formula.

It has 2 children and can only accept {MAPSTO, REL, TREL, SREL, STREL, PFUN, TFUN, PINJ, TINJ, PSUR, TSUR, TBIJ, SETMINUS, CPROD, DPROD, PPROD, DOMRES, DOMSUB, RANRES, RANSUB, UPTO, MINUS, DIV, MOD, EXPN, FUNIMAGE, RELIMAGE}

Since:
1.0

  • Method Details

    • init

      public static void init(BMath grammar)
      Since:
      2.0

    • getLeft

      public Expression getLeft()
      Returns the expression on the left-hand side of this node.
      Returns:
      the expression on the left-hand side

    • getRight

      public Expression getRight()
      Returns the expression on the right-hand side of this node.
      Returns:
      the expression on the right-hand side

    • accept

      public boolean accept(IVisitor visitor)
      Description copied from class: Formula
      Traverses this formula with the given visitor. In this complex version, the accept method also manages stepping through AST children nodes.
      Specified by:
      accept in class Formula<Expression>
      Parameters:
      visitor - the visitor to call back during traversal
      Returns:
      true to continue traversal, false to take some shortcut.
      See Also:
      • IVisitor

    • accept

      public void accept(ISimpleVisitor visitor)
      Description copied from class: Formula
      Accept the visit of this formula with the given simple visitor. In this simple version, this method only calls the visit method of the visitor corresponding to the dynamic class of the formula. Ast traversal is not managed by this method and shall be implemented in the visit methods of the client.
      Specified by:
      accept in class Formula<Expression>
      Parameters:
      visitor - the visitor to call back during traversal
      See Also:
      • ISimpleVisitor

    • isATypeExpression

      public boolean isATypeExpression()
      Description copied from class: Expression
      Returns whether this expression denotes a type.
      Overrides:
      isATypeExpression in class Expression
      Returns:
      true iff this expression denotes a type.

    • toType

      public Type toType()
      Description copied from class: Expression
      Returns the type corresponding to this type-checked expression.

      The returned type is not the type of this expression.

      Overrides:
      toType in class Expression
      Returns:
      the type represented by this expression
      See Also:
      • Type.toExpression()
      • Expression.isATypeExpression()

    • getChild

      public Expression getChild(int index)
      Description copied from class: Formula
      Returns the child at the given index. Child indexes are counted from 0 for the first child to getChildCount() - 1. for the last one.

      This method is not applicable to assignments.

      Specified by:
      getChild in class Formula<Expression>
      Parameters:
      index - index of the child to retrieve
      Returns:
      the child at the given index

    • getChildCount

      public int getChildCount()
      Description copied from class: Formula
      Returns the number of children of this formula.

      This method is not applicable to assignments.

      Specified by:
      getChildCount in class Formula<Expression>
      Returns:
      the number of children

    • isWDStrict

      public boolean isWDStrict()
      Description copied from class: Formula
      Returns whether this formula node is WD strict. This node is WD strict if its well-definedness implies the well-definedness of all of its children, for all WD syntactic transformations (D or L). For instance, addition is WD strict, while conjunction is not.
      Specified by:
      isWDStrict in class Formula<Expression>
      Returns:
      true iff this node is WD strict
